title: com.para.community.defs
summary: Reusable governance and community-view definitions that power moderation rosters, officials, deputy roles, counters, and edit history.
relationships: Links people, moderator views, officials, deputy roles, metadata, and history into one governance model.
constraints: Community summary requires member, poster, policy, matter, and badge-holder counters.
Deputy role views require key, tier, role, description, capabilities, votes, and applicants.

fields.name: summary
fields.description: Community-level counters for members, visible posters, policy posts, matter posts, and badge holders.

fields.name: moderatorView
fields.description: Governance view with role, badge, and capability metadata for a moderator.

fields.name: officialView
fields.description: Public official view including office and mandate.

fields.name: deputyRoleView
fields.description: Role hierarchy entry with active holder, capabilities, votes, and applicant queue.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Governance metadata such as term length, review cadence, escalation path, and flair identifiers.

fields.name: historyEntry
fields.description: Audit-friendly entry describing who changed what and when.
